parameters: The place to check isn't here...
For now, let's go to the kitchen...
It wouldn't be right to just barge in...
Sorry for the early morning call!
let's all work together as fellow villagers!
\N<Mayor>Haven't I told you about it yet?
We have to ensure the promotion of this village.
What exactly is this revitalization project about?
We've secured reservations for two guests at the inn.
There's no one to tend the inn.
The six of you here will work together
\N<Mayor>You can ask Shimoyama for more details.
were brought in by Shimoyama's promotional efforts.
His plan will determine the future of this village,
which is declining due to depopulation.
as if they were mine and act accordingly.
I'll make sure to take care of it. ♡
Be careful not to make any mistakes!
Why are you the one proposing the revitalization plan?
\N<Shimoyama>The Mayor asked me to do it.
He said our funds seem to be running out.
So I came up with this plan.
I told them, "Please come stay with us again."
is five times higher than last time. ♡
\N<Shimoyama>Haha, oh, Kaede, you catch on quickly... ♡
In exchange for providing some... nightly services. ♡
\N<Shimoyama>If not, who would come to this
\N<Naoto>You... you're kidding...! I won't allow that!
\N<Shimoyama>Do you have an alternative proposal then?
A plan that can promote the village
\N<Naoto>If you don't have one, then don't complain.
is at stake here, you know... ♡
\N<Shimoyama>The Tanaka couple is okay with it,
And since the landlady is absent,
the six of us here will operate the inn together.
\N<Naoto>How many days will those guests stay...?
\N<Shimoyama>And since we don't need six people
at the inn at the same time...
We'll rotate in groups of three...  ♡
Th-Then, me and Kaede can stay out of it, right!?
Neither I nor Aya, nor the Tanaka couple,
asked for this situation either, you know...
Why don't you draw the lot first then?
three days, it's effectively only two day
\N<Shimoyama>Now, the Tanaka couple, it's your turn! ♡
\N<Shimoyama>The two of you are decided then.
Now, it's just you and me left.
On the first day, it'll be you, Kaede, and Kazumi.
please do your best on the first day.
Please promote the village to the fullest... ♡
on the second floor, so Kaede...
Can handle the changing room, bathroom, and toilet?
on the first floor, the contents of the fridge,
and other amenities, including the washing machine.
\N<Kazumi>Let's disband for now and gather back
\N<Kazumi>Naoto, are the kitchen and washing machine
\N<Naoto>Oh, but there's a sleeping area and shower
in the back of the kitchen...
\N<Kazumi>Ah, that used to be the rest area
and shower for employees back in the day.
\N<Kaede>I think it'll be fine after cleaning later.
all the way to this mountain inn!
\N<Guest A>Oh, no, we had a great time
\N<Guest A>We'll be staying for two nights
and three days starting today. Please take care of us.
\N<Kazumi>Ah... I'll show you to your rooms then!
\N<Mayor> Ah, this is truly an exciting planned event
that we haven't seen in years.
But make sure to stay focused until the end...
I know I've said this multiple times,
but please, do not upset the guests in any way.
on the satisfaction of our guests.

The future of the village is at stake, you know...
What exactly is this evening hospitality about?
have a pleasant conversation. That's all...
As long as they're having fun,
not to upset the guests, right?
make sure no complaints come in. ♡
keep the fact that you two are married a secret, okay?
If both women entertaining the guests
are someone's wives, they won't be too pleased, right?
but you two shouldn't mention it, alright? ♡
I don't think we'll hit a jackpot consecutively,
so let's just do our best for today, just today.
\N<Kazumi>Then, you and I will prepare dinner.
Meanwhile, Naoto, could you check with the guest
\N<Kaede>That's why I'm asking what you want.
We're getting five times the usual lodging fee
I've also prepared some hospitality outfits... ♡
You haven't seen what kind of outfit it is, right?
You can decide after seeing it... ♡
The customers will be delighted, won't they? ♡
We need this level of service, don't we? ♡
What about the outfit I prepared...!?
\N<Kaede>NO! There's no way I can wear that!
who made a promise without asking me!
\N<Shimoyama>What will you do if you leave in anger?
\N<Kaede>I-I just have to not get angry, right?
The future of the village is at stake.
that jerk would come up with.
\N<Naoto>He even had one prepared for you...
\N<Kaede>H-He did... b-but! I won't wear it!
\N<Naoto>O-Of course... Y-You don't have to comply.
I thought that Kaede would trouble the guests...
You've been showing up mysteriously since earlier...
Before we do the bad luck draw...
It seems like you hit a guest yesterday...
I heard it from the guest... ♡
It's practically the last chance today...
\N<Shimoyama>Come on, there's no time to waste.
\N<Shimoyama>I'm counting on all three of you... ♡
Well then, what should we start with?
\N<Naoto>First, preparing dinner and drinks, I think.
\N<Aya>Okay! Then I'll take care of dinner and drinks!
Sis, please take care of dinner and drinks.
this isn't the place for it...
